title: Deterministic Skill Core
judgePrompt: Prefer the answer that makes randomness, time, and scheduling explicit and replayable. Reward seeded randomness, injected clocks, explicit ticks, and concrete replay/debugging guidance. Return tie if both answers are equally compliant or equally weak.

cases.task: Add a 15% crit chance and a rare loot drop to a combat rewards flow. QA needs to replay a reported bad run exactly. Keep the answer concise but concrete.
cases.outputHint: Make the randomness and replay boundary explicit instead of relying on ambient randomness or wall time.

cases.task: After an ability ends, show a "ready" toast 3 seconds later. The behavior must be testable and replay-safe across CI and local debugging. Keep the answer concise but concrete.
cases.outputHint: Prefer injected time and explicit progression over timers or sleeps.

cases.task: A combat bug only happens when a critical hit lands on the same frame a cooldown expires. Describe the change you would make so the bug is reproducible locally. Keep the answer concise but concrete.
cases.outputHint: Focus on explicit control of randomness, time, and scheduling.
